prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年物理类最低位次约6715→5875→7357→5756→7436，整体呈波动上升趋势（位次数字增大），近3年累计后移约1680名；2025年基准约7436名；本省物理类计划2021–2025年分别为118→114→110→99→113人，2025年较2024年扩招14人；2026年计划132人，较2025年扩招19人（+16.8%），扩招幅度较大，竞争压力有所缓解。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 985工程、211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名2026年第16名，近年稳定在Top20以内，综合实力顶尖；2026年声誉评价为“明显负面”，涉及师德师风、学术不端等负面事件51件，可能对部分考生报考意愿产生抑制作用；抖音热度排名第35位（较热），短视频曝光量中等偏上，关注度尚可；2022–2023年曾出现投档线异常信号，2023年高关注；第五轮学科评估A-及以上学科达19个，其中口腔医学A+、临床医学A、中国语言文学A+、护理学A+、药学A、计算机科学与技术A-、数学A等，医学与工科实力突出。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程等专业社会热度高热推荐，临床医学、口腔医学持续偏热，相关专业报考竞争激烈；湖北省2026年考生总数约39.37万，仅知总人数，按2025年物理类占比约63.9%估算约25.2万人，较2025年物理类24.98万人略有增加，竞争基数微升；四川大学位于成都市，属西南地区，对湖北考生有一定跨省吸引力；该校在湖北招生规模较大（物理类132人），属省外重点生源省份。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次7436名、2026年物理类大幅扩招（+16.8%）缓解竞争、学校声誉负面事件可能抑制部分报考热度、考生总数微增等因素，预计2026年最低位次约8136名；预测区间7636–8636名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category was approximately 6715 → 5875 → 7357 → 5756 → 7436, showing an overall fluctuating upward trend (ranking numbers increasing). Over the past 3 years, the ranking has shifted backward by about 1680 places. The baseline for 2025 is approximately 7436. The provincial Physics Category enrollment plans from 2021 to 2025 were 118 → 114 → 110 → 99 → 113, with an increase of 14 students in 2025 compared to 2024. The 2026 plan is 132 students, an increase of 19 students (+16.8%) over 2025, representing a significant expansion that eases competitive pressure.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class university. Ranked 16th in the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, consistently within the top 20 in recent years, with top-tier comprehensive strength. The 2026 reputation evaluation is 'clearly negative,' involving 51 negative incidents related to teacher ethics, academic misconduct, etc., which may suppress some candidates' willingness to apply. Douyin popularity ranks 35th (relatively hot), with above-average short video exposure and moderate attention. Abnormal signals in admission scores occurred in 2022–2023, with high attention in 2023. In the fifth round of discipline evaluations, 19 disciplines were rated A- or above, including Stomatology A+, Clinical Medicine A, Chinese Language and Literature A+, Nursing A+, Pharmacy A, Computer Science and Technology A-, Mathematics A, etc., highlighting strong medical and engineering strengths.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering are highly popular and recommended. Clinical Medicine and Stomatology remain consistently hot, leading to intense competition for related majors. The total number of examinees in Hubei Province for 2026 is approximately 393,700. Based on the 2025 Physics Category proportion of about 63.9%, the estimated number is around 252,000, a slight increase from the 2025 Physics Category of 249,800, indicating a marginal rise in the competition base. Sichuan University is located in Chengdu, in the southwestern region, offering some cross-provincial appeal to Hubei candidates. The university has a relatively large enrollment scale in Hubei (132 students in Physics Category), making it a key source province outside the province.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 7436, the significant enrollment expansion in Physics Category for 2026 (+16.8%) easing competition, the potential suppression of some application enthusiasm due to negative reputation events, and a slight increase in the total number of examinees, the estimated minimum ranking for 2026 is approximately 8136. The predicted range is 7636–8636.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: For rankings within the predicted range of 7636–8636, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors (Computer Science, Electronic Information, Electrical Engineering) as the main direction. Tier 1 medical majors (Clinical Medicine, Stomatology) require a ranking significantly better than the lower bound of the range to be considered for sprinting. Tier 3 majors can serve as safety choices. Under the context of enrollment expansion, the admission probability for mid-tier majors has increased.
